member.name: T:robot_controller_api.Controllers.MapsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints to manage and validate robot maps.

member.name: M:robot_controller_api.Controllers.MapsController.CheckCoordinate(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether a given coordinate (x, y) exists within a specific map.
member.returns: True if the coordinate is within the map boundaries; otherwise false.
member.response: If x or y is negative.
If the map is not found.

member.name: T:robot_controller_api.Controllers.RobotCommandsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints to manage robot commands.

member.name: M:robot_controller_api.Controllers.RobotCommandsController.GetRobotCommandById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a robot command by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the robot command.
member.response: If the robot command is not found.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
